    Serialized Form

    • Package org.example.domain

      • Class org.example.domain.Duck

        class Duck extends User implements Serializable

          • duckType
            DuckType duckType
          • resistance
            Double resistance
          • speed
            Double speed

      • Class org.example.domain.Entity

        class Entity extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        7331115341259248461L

        • Serialized Fields

          • id
            ID id

      • Class org.example.domain.Friendship

        class Friendship extends Entity<Long> implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • firstFriendId
            Long firstFriendId
          • secondFriendId
            Long secondFriendId

      • Class org.example.domain.Person

        class Person extends User implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • name
            String name
          • occupation
            String occupation
          • surname
            String surname

      • Class org.example.domain.User

        class User extends Entity<Long> implements Serializable

            String email
          • password
            String password
          • username
            String username
          • userType
            String userType

        class EntityNotFoundException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable
